title: NHOWIN Pop Up Beach Tent for 2-3 Persons, 2025 Upgraded Windproof Pop Up Tent with 4 Wind Ropes & 8 Nails, 50+ UV Sun Protection Beach Shelter Portable & Easy Set Up Sun Shade for Park Garden Picnic
features: 【Spacious Pop Up Beach Tent】Generously sized at 165x150x115cm, our beach tent comfortably fits 2-3 adults. Built-in storage pockets keep essentials like phones, keys, and cards secure, allowing families and groups relax fully while enjoying coastal vistas.

【One-Second Setup & Convenient Storage】NHOWIN pop up tent requires zero assembly, simply toss it open for instant shelter. Reverse the process effortlessly: follow clear folding steps to pack it into a compact 45x45x3cm carry case within minutes. No wrestling with poles or sorting out tangled fabric!

【Dual Windproof System】In addition to the reinforcement pegs commonly found in other beach tents on the market, our pop up tent also add adjustable drawstring fixtures, double windproof system can withstand coastal gusts, preventing sudden gusts of wind causing embarrassing "tent chasing" situation!

【Ultra-Portable Compact Design】Weighing just 1kg (folded size: 45x45x3cm), our portable beach shelter includes a shoulder strap for hands-free carrying. The compact folding size of our beach tent makes it ideal for shade on the beach, at festivals or on hikes.

【UPF50+ Sun Protection & Waterproof】NHOWIN beach tent pop up is made of 190T silver-coated polyester that reflects 98% of UV rays and blocks 99% of UVA/UVB radiation. The waterproof fabric protects against light rain and ensures protection from sunburn and inclement weather throughout the day. With a 1 year warranty and English speaking customer service support, we are committed to ensuring your satisfaction.
